response.justification: Despite extensive experience as a senior software engineer, the candidate lacks demonstrated Java proficiency in recent roles, has only basic German language skills (a hard requirement), and holds a senior title inconsistent with an entry-level role, raising concerns about fit, salary expectations, and alignment with the job's junior focus.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and domains
Strong contributions to open-source and community-driven tech initiatives
Proven expertise in agile practices, CI/CD, and test-driven development
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting required fluency
No recent Java project experience despite Java being a core requirement
Senior-level title and career trajectory suggest overqualification for an entry-level role
